rdf:Description.skos:definition: What are the different types of joints in the skeletal system?

What are the main parts of a kidney?

What are the components of a nephron?
Which structures are part of the oral region?
What are the main chambers of the heart?

What types of valves are in the heart?

What kind of organ is the pancreas?

Is the cardiovascular system a type of organ system?
What kind of muscle tissue is myocardium?

What bones are part of the pelvic girdle?
What are the parts of the leg?

What type of bone is a phalanx?

What is the pituitary gland a part of?

Which structures are part of the spleen?

What are the layers of the epidermis?
What is the relationship between the foot and the autopod?

What are the parts of the arm?

Which structures are part of the axial skeleton?

What is the relationship between the nasopharynx and the pharynx?
What is the truncus arteriosus a part of?
